relations.subject: Red-naped bushshrike
relations.evidence: kismayensis (top) | image2 = Laniarius ruficeps - Adrien Jailloux - 607781219.jpeg | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Laniarius | species = ruficeps | authority = (Shelley, 1885) | synonyms = Dryoscopus ruficeps Shelley, 1885 }} The red-naped bushshrike or red-naped boubou (Laniarius ruficeps) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae, which is native to the dry lowlands of the eastern Afrotropics
